name: Execute
description: Execute page (/execute). Re-authored for PR #288 ('Dashboard workflow authoring without a co-located runner'): unified-workflows now reads the web canonical store (GET /api/v1/unified-workflows) instead of the local runner, and the old runner-offline hard gate (RunnerOfflineState 'Runner Not Connected') was deliberately removed so the workflow-authoring UI ALWAYS renders even with no co-located runner. Heading disambiguation (PR #524): the /execute page heading is now 'Execute' (the prior 'Workflows' heading moved to /build/workflows) so the run-builder surface is distinct from the workflow-authoring surface in the co-pilot page map. The SPEC_CI (ci-bot) account has no runner AND an empty workflow store, so this page renders the functional authoring surface in its empty state: an 'Execute' header, a 'Workflow Library' panel (search + 'No workflows available' empty-state) and a 'Sequence Builder' panel (empty drop-zone hint + the always-visible Clear / Save as Workflow / Run action bar). Run/dispatch are present-but-disabled (gated on a connected runner); save/import/editors stay enabled. Asserts the always-present authoring structure, never workflow data.

states.name: Workflow authoring surface
states.description: The no-runner workflow-authoring UI that #288 made always-render. Anchored by the 'Execute' page heading (renamed from 'Workflows' in PR #524), the Workflow Library search input, and the library empty-state hint ('No workflows available') that ci-bot's empty store reliably produces.

assertions.description: h1 'Execute' headlines the run-builder page (renamed from 'Workflows' in PR #524; replaces the removed 'Runner Not Connected' gate).
Page heading text reads 'Execute' (role+text cross-check on the same h1; renamed from 'Workflows' in PR #524).
Workflow Library search input is present (the authoring UI rendered, not an offline gate).
Library empty-state hint ('No workflows available') for ci-bot's empty canonical store.

states.name: Sequence Builder panel
states.description: The Sequence Builder panel and its always-visible action bar. The empty drop-zone hint and the Clear / Save as Workflow / Run buttons render regardless of runner connectivity (the bottom bar is intentionally always-visible so UI Bridge specs see the actions; Run/dispatch are disabled without a connected runner).

assertions.description: Empty sequence-builder drop-zone hint instructs dragging workflows from the library.
'Run' action button is present in the always-visible bottom bar (role+text avoids the positional ordinal suffix).
'Save as Workflow' action button is present (authoring stays enabled with no runner).

target.label: Save as Workflow button by role+text
